verdict: CeraVe's AM moisturizer combines hydration with SPF 30 and niacinamide, making it exceptional value for a multi-function daytime product. The formula balances protection, hydration, and skin-barrier support effectively.

_research.name: CeraVe AM Facial Moisturizing Lotion SPF 30
pros: Broad-spectrum SPF 30 with hydrating moisturizer base
Niacinamide supports skin barrier and sebum regulation
Lightweight formula suitable for facial use
_research.con: Chemical sunscreen filters may irritate very sensitive skin; lacks antioxidants like vitamin C.
